_doc: Manual live-title -> catalog-title aliases for pillow reconciliation. Used by classify-vs-live.mjs and title-reconciliation.mjs. Keep small; only add entries confirmed by slug or visual match.

aliases.Brown Fur + Mud Cloth Lumbar Oversize: Brown Fur / Mudcloth Long Oversize Pillow
aliases.Ivory Brown Chain Lumbar: Ivory Brown Chain Link Lumbar Pillow

_unresolved.Brown Yellow Pillow: live-only — no catalog match. Owner confirm: drop from live or add to RMS.
_unresolved.Ivory Sage Stripe Pillow: live-only — catalog has 'Ivory Sage Mini Tassel'. Likely different SKU. Owner confirm.
_unresolved.Ivory Linen Lumbar: live-only — catalog has 'Ivory Linen Pillow' only. Lumbar variant missing from RMS.
_unresolved.Ivory Linen Small Lumbar: live-only — same as above. Small lumbar variant missing from RMS.
_unresolved.Red Slightly Darker Velvet Pillow: catalog-only — orphan in RMS, no live card. Likely retired or duplicate of Red Velvet Pillow.
_unresolved.Woven Sand Aztec: catalog-only — orphan in RMS, no live card.
_unresolved.Orange Textile Pillow Dos / Tres: catalog-only — live consolidated 3 SKUs into 1 'Orange Brown Textile Pillow' card.
